title: Automated Greenhouse Climate Controller
description: Multi-zone controller managing temperature, RH, CO₂, soil moisture, and lighting for a 6×3 m hobby greenhouse. Grafana dashboard over WiFi.
constraints: Mains 230 V; safety interlock on heating; ≤ 4 sensor zones; 30-day local retention.
design_element_titles: SHT41 Digital Temperature and RH Sensing

element_usage_notes.Solid-State Relay Mains Actuator Switchi: Switches 230 V fan, heater, and LED driver.
